title: Mildly Spicy Tunisian Nuka Pickle Toast
description: A quick and easy Tunisian dish featuring toast, nuka pickle, and herbal flavors, perfect for a light snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat a toaster or toaster oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, garlic, harissa, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the toasted bread slices.
Top each bread slice with a slice of nuka pickle.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the nuka pickle.
Optional: serve with a side of low-sodium hummus or tzatziki sauce.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
